title: GPQOL
description: Greenparrott's completely client side quality of life and performance modpack.
body:
Greenparrott's completely client side quality of life and performance modpack. These are the mods that I just like to have while playing minecraft, regardless of the situation.

This modpack is adapted from robotkoer's Fabulously Optimized modpack, which I then customized and built upon. If you want to check that out, here is the [link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).

Resource packs used:
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
- [Improved Netherite](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/improved-netherite-by-toxteer/)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
